title: Shrimp and Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry with succulent shrimp and savory noodles. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the garlic and ginger (if using) and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the noodles to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to brown.
Add the savory sauce, soy sauce, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Return the shrimp to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the shrimp are coated.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions.
Cooking time for noodles is usually around 3-5 minutes, or according to package instructions.
Do not overcook the shrimp, as they will continue to cook a bit after being removed from the heat.
